creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
FreeBSD ports currently lack File::Tail module for Ruby, this PR
tries to add one.

Fix: This is shar archive for the new port.  It was tested on my Tinderbox
for 6.x, 7.x and 8.x; it also works fine if used from Ruby scripts.
How-To-Repeat: 
Search for tail(1) implementations for Ruby, search them in the
FreeBSD ports collection.
